text.title: ads-ab-testing-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-ab-testing-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running a "fresh creative" test where headline, visual, copy, and format are all different between control and variant.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This is not a test — it is a coin flip between two complete creative packages. Neither outcome produces actionable learning about which element to iterate on.

failure-mode.description: Mixing significance methods — using Meta's platform significance for some tests and scipy.stats.ttest_ind for others.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different statistical engines compute significance differently. Mixing methods makes tests incomparable and can produce contradictory verdicts on the same data.

failure-mode.description: LLMs eagerly declare winners on small samples.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always require the agent to compute sample size first and refuse to verdict until threshold met.

failure-mode.description: "Statistical significance" in Meta UI is not always the same metric as scipy.stats.ttest_ind on raw counts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin one stats engine and do not mix. Different statistical engines compute significance differently; mixing methods makes tests incomparable.

failure-mode.description: When variant outperforms by more than 50%, suspect data leakage (audience overlap, tracking gap) before celebrating.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Have agent run an integrity check (impression counts within 5% of expected split).

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The variant might win on CTR but lose on CPA. Require no regression on secondary metric beyond X%.

failure-mode.description: Agents recreate a "test" each week even when last week's winner was inconclusive.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce: inconclusive tests extend, not restart. Restarting resets the sample and wastes data already collected.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent must convert revenue to a base currency before computing ROAS lift.
